title: SAP S/4HANA Sales Order
description: Schema for SAP S/4HANA Sales Order documents managed through the API_SALES_ORDER_SRV OData service. Covers the complete sales order structure including header data, line items, pricing elements, schedule lines, partner functions, and text records. Sales orders represent a customer's request for goods or services and drive downstream logistics, billing, and accounting processes.

SalesOrder.description: Sales order header record (A_SalesOrder) containing organizational data, customer references, pricing totals, delivery requirements, and overall processing status for the sales document.
Sales order number, a unique 10-digit identifier assigned by the system

SalesOrderType.description: Sales document type controlling the document's behavior (e.g., OR=Standard Order, RE=Returns, CR=Credit Memo Request, DR=Debit Memo Request, BV=Cash Sale, SO=Rush Order)

SalesOrganization.description: Sales organization responsible for the sale, determining pricing, output, and partner determination procedures

DistributionChannel.description: Distribution channel representing the path through which goods or services reach the customer (e.g., 10=Direct Sales, 12=Online)

OrganizationDivision.description: Division for grouping materials and services within the sales organization

SalesGroup.description: Sales group within the sales organization responsible for the order

SalesDistrict.description: Geographic sales district for reporting and analysis

SoldToParty.description: Customer number of the sold-to party who places the order

CreationDate.description: Date when the sales order was created in the system

CreatedByUser.description: SAP user ID of the person who created the sales order

LastChangeDate.description: Date of the most recent change to the sales order

LastChangeDateTime.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent change

PurchaseOrderByCustomer.description: Customer's purchase order number for reference and matching

CustomerPurchaseOrderType.description: Type of the customer's purchase order

CustomerPurchaseOrderDate.description: Date of the customer's purchase order

SalesOrderDate.description: Document date of the sales order

TotalNetAmount.description: Total net value of all items in the sales order expressed in document currency

TransactionCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the sales order

SDDocumentReason.description: Reason code for the order (e.g., reason for return or credit memo)

PricingDate.description: Date used to determine valid pricing conditions

RequestedDeliveryDate.description: Customer-requested delivery date for the entire order

ShippingCondition.description: Shipping condition code determining the shipping point and route

CompleteDeliveryIsDefined.description: If true, all items must be delivered together in a single delivery

ShippingType.description: Shipping type code (e.g., rail, truck, air)

HeaderBillingBlockReason.description: Billing block reason preventing invoice creation at header level

DeliveryBlockReason.description: Delivery block reason preventing delivery creation

IncotermsClassification.description: Incoterms classification code defining responsibilities for transport costs and risk (e.g., EXW, FOB, CIF, DDP)

IncotermsTransferLocation.description: Named place for Incoterms (e.g., port or destination city)

IncotermsVersion.description: Version year of the Incoterms used (e.g., 2020)

CustomerPaymentTerms.description: Payment terms key determining payment due dates and cash discount periods

AssignmentReference.description: Reference number for accounting document assignment

ReferenceSDDocument.description: Reference sales document number (e.g., preceding quotation or contract)

ReferenceSDDocumentCategory.description: Category of the reference sales document

AccountingExchangeRate.description: Exchange rate used for converting to local currency in accounting

OverallSDProcessStatus.description: Overall processing status (A=Not yet processed, B=Partially processed, C=Completely processed)

TotalCreditCheckStatus.description: Overall credit check status across all items

OverallTotalDeliveryStatus.description: Overall delivery status (A=Not yet processed, B=Partially delivered, C=Completely delivered)

OverallSDDocumentRejectionSts.description: Overall rejection status of the sales document

to_Item.description: Line items belonging to this sales order

SalesOrderItem.description: Sales order line item (A_SalesOrderItem) representing a single material or service line within a sales order, including quantity, pricing, plant assignment, and item-level status.

SalesOrder.description: Sales order number the item belongs to

SalesOrderItem.description: Item number within the sales order, typically in increments of 10

HigherLevelItem.description: Higher-level item in a bill of materials (BOM) hierarchy

SalesOrderItemCategory.description: Item category controlling the item's processing (e.g., TAN=Standard, TANN=Free-of-charge, TAD=Service)

SalesOrderItemText.description: Short text description of the item

PurchaseOrderByCustomer.description: Customer purchase order number at item level

Material.description: Material number from the SAP material master

MaterialByCustomer.description: Material number as known by the customer

PricingDate.description: Date used for pricing condition determination at item level

BillingPlan.description: Billing plan number for periodic or milestone billing

RequestedQuantityUnit.description: ISO unit of measure for the requested quantity

RequestedQuantitySAPUnit.description: SAP internal unit of measure code

RequestedQuantityIsFixed.description: Indicator that the requested quantity cannot be changed by ATP

ItemWeightUnit.description: Unit of measure for weight (e.g., KG, LB)

TransactionCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code at item level

NetAmount.description: Net value of the item in document currency

TotalSDAmount.description: Total SD amount for the item

MaterialPricingGroup.description: Material pricing group for condition determination

ProductionPlant.description: Production plant if different from delivering plant

DeliveryGroup.description: Delivery group for grouping items into deliveries

ShippingPoint.description: Shipping point responsible for organizing outbound delivery

IncotermsClassification.description: Incoterms at item level, overrides header if specified

CustomerPaymentTerms.description: Payment terms at item level, overrides header if specified

SalesDocumentRjcnReason.description: Reason for rejecting the sales order item

ItemBillingBlockReason.description: Billing block reason at item level

WBSElement.description: Work breakdown structure element for project assignment

OrderID.description: Internal order number for cost assignment

CostCenter.description: Cost center for overhead cost assignment

DeliveryStatus.description: Delivery status (A=Not delivered, B=Partially delivered, C=Completely delivered)

CustomerGroup.description: Customer group for pricing and statistics

to_ScheduleLine.description: Delivery schedule lines with confirmed quantities and dates

SalesOrderHeaderPartner.description: Header-level partner function (A_SalesOrderHeaderPartner) assigning a business partner to a role such as sold-to, ship-to, bill-to, or payer.

PartnerFunction.description: Partner function code (AG=Sold-to party, WE=Ship-to party, RE=Bill-to party, RG=Payer, AP=Contact person)

Customer.description: Customer number assigned to this partner function

Supplier.description: Supplier number if the partner is a vendor

ContactPerson.description: Contact person number at the customer

SalesOrderItemPartner.description: Item-level partner function (A_SalesOrderItemPartner) allowing partner overrides at the line item level.

SalesOrderHeaderPrcgElmnt.description: Header-level pricing condition (A_SalesOrderHeaderPrcgElmnt) representing a pricing element such as a price, discount, surcharge, tax, or freight charge applied at the order level.

PricingProcedureStep.description: Step number within the pricing procedure

PricingProcedureCounter.description: Counter differentiating multiple conditions of the same type at a step

ConditionType.description: Condition type identifier (e.g., PR00=Price, K004=Material Discount, K005=Customer Discount, MWST=Tax, KF00=Freight)

ConditionRateValue.description: Rate or percentage value of the condition per pricing unit

ConditionQuantityUnit.description: Unit of measure for the pricing unit

ConditionAmount.description: Total calculated amount for the condition in document currency

ConditionIsForStatistics.description: If true, condition is statistical and does not affect the document value

ConditionOrigin.description: Origin of the condition (e.g., automatic, manual)

ConditionIsManuallyChanged.description: Indicator that the condition was manually overridden

SalesOrderItemPrcgElmnt.description: Item-level pricing condition (A_SalesOrderItemPrcgElmnt) representing a pricing element applied at the line item level.

PricingProcedureStep.description: Step number within the pricing procedure

SalesOrderScheduleLine.description: Schedule line (A_SalesOrderScheduleLine) representing a delivery date and quantity commitment for a sales order item, including confirmed quantities from availability check (ATP).

ScheduleLine.description: Schedule line number within the item

RequestedDeliveryDate.description: Requested delivery date for this schedule line

ConfirmedDeliveryDate.description: Delivery date confirmed by ATP check

ScheduleLineOrderQuantity.description: Ordered quantity on this schedule line

ConfdOrderQtyByMatlAvailCheck.description: Quantity confirmed as available by ATP

OpenConfdDelivQtyInOrdQtyUnit.description: Open confirmed quantity still to be delivered

DelivBlockReasonForSchedLine.description: Delivery block reason for this schedule line

SalesOrderText.description: Header-level text record (A_SalesOrderText) containing long text associated with the sales order header such as notes, header comments, and shipping instructions.

LongTextID.description: Text ID identifying the text type (e.g., 0001=Header note, 0002=Internal note)

SalesOrderItemText.description: Item-level text record (A_SalesOrderItemText) containing long text for a specific sales order item.

__count.description: Total count of matching entities when $inlinecount=allpages is used
